headline: Nike Restructuring And New CEO Mark Turning Point In Profit Story
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is reportedly preparing a major restructuring in response to business pressures in key areas such as performance running. The company is dealing with weak consumer demand, elevated inventory levels, and tougher competition in core categories. New CEO Elliott Hill has arrived with a turnaround plan that coincides with profit warnings from important Chinese distributors. These developments point to a meaningful shift in how Nike intends to run its business and prioritize growth...

These developments point to a meaningful shift in how Nike intends to run its business and prioritize growth...

headline: Adidas shares slump on outlook, Mideast war impact uncertain
summary: Adidas's shares slumped Wednesday after its 2026 outlook disappointed investors, while the German sportswear giant said any potential impact on its business from the Middle East war was still unclear. Gulden said there would be a "revenue impact" where stores in the region have had to close and there could be disruptions to air freight that goes through the Middle East, potentially delaying delivery of some products.

raw.headline: Adidas shares slump on outlook, Mideast war impact uncertain

headline: NIKE Inc. (NYSE:NKE) Presents a Compelling Case for Dividend Investors Amidst Recovery Prospects
summary: Nike offers a 2.56% dividend yield with a strong history of increases, backed by solid profitability and a manageable balance sheet for income-focused investors.

headline: Adidas shares slump on downbeat profit outlook
summary: Adidas shares slumped Wednesday after the German sportswear giant gave a disappointing 2026 profit forecast and warned of a 400-million-euro ($465-million) hit from US tariffs and exchange rate effects. "US tariffs and unfavourable currency developments" together would deliver a 400-million-euro hit to Adidas's profits this year, the group said.

raw.headline: Adidas shares slump on downbeat profit outlook

headline: Bessent says global 15% tariff starts this week, predicts Trump duties will return to old levels later this year
summary: The Supreme Court last month ruled that President Donald Trump's sweeping global tariffs are not authorized under the law known as IEEPA.

headline: Sportswear giant Adidas drops 8% after profit guidance disappoints
summary: Adidas shares have fallen about 43% over the past year as investors remain skeptical about the growth prospects of the global sportswear industry.
